message:
fix(engine): apply saturating arithmetic to remaining unchecked sum sites across 19 modules

Continue the overflow-hardening pass from 49d97cf0 and 44e1290b by converting
all remaining .iter().sum() patterns to .fold(0, saturating_add) across
bayesian_posterior, benchmark_e2e, benchmark_evidence_bundle,
bifurcation_boundary_scanner, bytecode_vm, catastrophic_tail_tournament_gate,
cold_start_aot_governance, cold_start_compilation_lane, frankentui_adapter,
gc_pause, guardplane_calibration, law_promotion_lifecycle, opportunity_matrix,
regret_bounded_router, runtime_comparison_gate, specialization_conformance,
spectral_fleet_convergence, tail_latency_control_plane, and trust_card.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -799,12 +799,12 @@ impl BifurcationBoundaryScanner {
         let first_half_avg = param_obs[..mid]
             .iter()
             .map(|o| o.value_millionths)
-            .sum::<i64>()
+            .fold(0i64, |acc, x| acc.saturating_add(x))
             / mid as i64;
         let second_half_avg = param_obs[mid..]
             .iter()
             .map(|o| o.value_millionths)
-            .sum::<i64>()
+            .fold(0i64, |acc, x| acc.saturating_add(x))
             / (param_obs.len() - mid) as i64;
 
         (second_half_avg - first_half_avg, count)
